context.audience: Developers integrating LLMs into applications, product managers designing AI-powered features, content creators using AI for writing and generation workflows
pain_points: Getting consistent, reliable output from LLMs across different inputs and edge cases
Structuring prompts for complex multi-step reasoning tasks
Prompt versioning and regression testing as models update
Reducing token usage and cost without sacrificing output quality
Adapting prompts when switching between LLM providers
